headline: BlackRock Future Builders RFP Links Skilled Trades Philanthropy And Client Relations
summary: BlackRock (NYSE:BLK) has launched a $25 million Request for Proposals under its Future Builders program. The RFP aims to fund multi-year nonprofit grants that support careers in the skilled trades across the United States. This $25 million commitment is part of BlackRock's broader $100 million Future Builders initiative focused on workforce development. summary: 'I think you gotta stay in,' says the top BlackRock investing official, as earnings growth and cash to be reinvested in stocks support the AI bull market.
